arts.ttl: Newcastle United set for double cup final boost after Harvey Barnes & Joelinton updates
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe is expecting both Harvey Barnes and Joelinton to be back in contention for the Carabao Cup final next month. When asked about the Italian, Howe said: "Sandro has become a key figure in our midfielder, highlighted again, I think, last week against Birmingham.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth-round TV schedule announced as BBC and ITV both get huge matches
arts.sum: Kick-off times and TV schedules for the eight FA Cup fifth-round matches have been confirmed, with holders Manchester United and 2023 winner Manchester City both involved

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe confirms Anthony Gordon injury latest ahead of Newcastle's trip to Man City
arts.sum: Magpies likely to be without two key stars for clash with Premier League champions

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea, Manchester City winger Shaun Wright-Phillips reveals prediction for Premier League top four
arts.sum: Shaun Wright-Phillips - formerly of Chelsea and Manchester City - tells Sports Mole of his prediction for which of his former clubs will finish in the top four of the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news:Isak prefers Liverpool move as Neymar eyes Barcelona return
arts.sum: The transfer window has closed for every top European league but planning will already be all underway for the summer window. Teams are working tirelessly behind the scenes on identifying targets...

arts.ttl: Manuel Akanji injury blow leaves make-or-break run for two Man City teammates amid Real Madrid test
arts.sum: Manuel Akanji could be set for a spell on the sidelines for Manchester City's testing run in February which includes Real Madrid, Liverpool and Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon makes feelings clear on Liverpool after failed £80m transfer
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon was heavily linked with a Liverpool move back in the summer but Newcastle rejected an £80m approach for the winger, who was at Anfield during his academy days

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's Martin Dubravka breaks silence on what happened in transfer window
arts.sum: Opening up on the contract offer, Dubravka said: "There was a specific offer on the table (from Al-Shabab) and discussions from early December, but I always said to Newcastle ‘it’s basically up to you what you want to do’. Dubravka told Sky Sports: "I am glad that I am coming back to where I belong, I was always fully committed to the club and I hope that people can see that as well.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak can be the next Alan Shearer if he doesn't do what I did
arts.sum: Remy admits it would take 'crazy money' to prise Isak away from St James' Park, and insists he can emulate club legend Alan Shearer if he stays on Tyneside and continues to score goals in the famous black-and-white shirt. There has been plenty of speculation over Isak's future too, although the Swede has repeatedly insisted he is happy at Newcastle - while the club have no intention of selling their star striker.

arts.ttl: ‘I’m interested’: £40m-rated defender says he nearly joined Newcastle for just £2m
arts.sum: Newcastle United have missed out on some fantastic signings over the years. Indeed, Jarrod Bowen nearly signed for Newcastle before he joined West Ham, while...
